title: Mediterranean Charred Beef Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring charred beef and a rich unsalted beef stock, with a unique spherified twist, perfect for a cozy dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the beef short ribs with salt, pepper, and paprika
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat and sear the beef short ribs until browned on all sides
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the garlic, dried oregano, and unsalted beef stock to the pot, bringing the mixture to a boil
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven, cooking for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender
While the beef is cooking, mix the sodium alginate with a small amount of water to create a spherification bath
Once the beef is done, remove it from the pot and strain the cooking liquid, discarding any excess fat
Add the cooking liquid to the spherification bath and drop small amounts of the mixture into the bath to create spherified pearls
Serve the charred beef with the spherified pearls and a side of couscous or roasted vegetables
